name: ai-engineer
description: Build production-ready LLM applications, advanced RAG systems, and
capabilities: Design and implement production RAG systems with hybrid search and reranking
Build intelligent AI agents with LangChain, LlamaIndex, and CrewAI frameworks
Integrate vector databases (Pinecone, Qdrant, Weaviate) for semantic search
Implement multimodal AI with vision, audio, and document processing models
Optimize LLM costs through model routing, caching, and token management
Add AI safety guardrails for prompt injection, PII detection, and content moderation
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Prompt-only skill with no executable code. Static analysis scanned 0 files (0 lines) and detected 0 potential security issues. Risk score: 0/100. This is a text-based persona prompt for AI engineering tasks with no scripts, network calls, filesystem access, or external command execution. No prompt injection attempts detected.
valueStatement: Rapidly develop production-grade LLM applications, RAG systems, and intelligent AI agents with expert guidance on vector search, multimodal AI, and enterprise integrations.
userTitle: Build Production LLM Apps with AI Engineer
limitations: Cannot access external APIs or services without proper credentials and network configuration
Cannot execute code directly - provides code examples that users must run themselves
Cannot access private data or internal systems without explicit configuration
Model recommendations may become outdated as AI landscape evolves rapidly

useCases.targetUser: Enterprise developers building internal knowledge management systems
useCases.title: Enterprise Knowledge Base RAG
useCases.description: Build a production RAG system that combines vector search with keyword matching to provide accurate answers from company documentation.

useCases.targetUser: Product teams building automated customer support solutions
useCases.title: Customer Service AI Agent
useCases.description: Create a multi-agent system that handles customer inquiries with escalation workflows and integration to CRM systems.

useCases.targetUser: Data engineers building document processing workflows
useCases.title: Document Analysis Pipeline
useCases.description: Implement a multimodal pipeline that extracts information from PDFs, images, and tables for automated document processing.

promptTemplates.title: Basic RAG Setup
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me build a basic RAG system using LangChain and Qdrant for semantic search. Include vector storage, chunking strategy, and retrieval pipeline.
promptTemplates.scenario: Starting a new RAG project from scratch

promptTemplates.title: Production RAG Optimization
promptTemplates.prompt: Improve my current RAG system with hybrid search, reranking, and query decomposition. How do I implement these patterns in production?
promptTemplates.scenario: Optimizing an existing RAG system for better accuracy

promptTemplates.title: Multi-Agent System Design
promptTemplates.prompt: Design a multi-agent system using CrewAI with specialized roles for research, analysis, and reporting. Include memory management and tool integration.
promptTemplates.scenario: Building a collaborative AI agent system

promptTemplates.title: Cost-Optimized LLM Pipeline
promptTemplates.prompt: Design a cost-optimized LLM inference pipeline with semantic caching, model routing based on query complexity, and budget controls.

bestPractices: Start with clear success metrics and evaluation frameworks before building AI systems
Implement observability from day one with tracing, metrics, and logging
Use structured outputs and type safety to ensure reliable AI behavior
antiPatterns: Building proof-of-concept without considering production scalability
Skipping error handling and fallback strategies for AI service failures
Ignoring cost implications of LLM usage in production systems

faq.question: What vector databases does this skill support?
faq.answer: Supports Pinecone, Qdrant, Weaviate, Chroma, Milvus, and pgvector for vector storage and semantic search.

faq.question: Can this skill help with fine-tuning models?
faq.answer: This skill focuses on application development. For fine-tuning, it can guide on data preparation but recommends specialized ML engineering resources.

faq.question: Does this skill support local LLM deployment?
faq.answer: Yes, supports Ollama, vLLM, and TGI for local model deployment with guidance on optimization.

faq.question: How does this skill handle AI safety?
faq.answer: Provides guidance on prompt injection detection, PII redaction, content moderation, and responsible AI practices.

faq.question: Can this skill integrate with my existing codebase?
faq.answer: Yes, provides integration guidance for REST APIs, GraphQL, webhooks, and enterprise systems like Slack and Salesforce.

faq.question: What agent frameworks are supported?
faq.answer: Supports LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, AutoGen, and OpenAI Assistants API for agent development.
